title: Does anybody have subtitles for 20
wikitext:
[]: Does anybody have subtitles for 2.0? Post by marinrey » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:04 pm Does anyone hace any subtitle , either in english or spanish, for the evangelion 2.0 camrip ? I've downloaded the movie but I don't understand Japanese ! So please if anyone have any subtitles , please post! I've search all over the internet for days, and nothing! And if someone knows Japanese please do us the favour for the million fans that need these subtitles.

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:08 pm Ugh [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7007&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=0[/url] No subs yet. Go read the rules.

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:13 pm Patience, young one.
